title: Receipt Binding v1
description: Standard binding fields that tie a gateway receipt to a specific run, event, and idempotency scope. Harnesses attach these via HTTP headers (X-Run-Id, X-Event-Hash, X-Idempotency-Key) when routing LLM calls through clawproxy.

run_id.description: Run identifier correlating this receipt to a specific agent run. Sent via X-Run-Id header.

event_hash_b64u.description: Hash of the event in the chain that triggered this LLM call (base64url). Sent via X-Event-Hash header.

nonce.description: Idempotency nonce to prevent duplicate receipt issuance. Sent via X-Idempotency-Key header.

policy_hash.description: Work Policy Contract hash, injected by the proxy when a policy is enforced.

token_scope_hash_b64u.description: Hash of the scoped token (CST) claims, injected by the proxy when a CST is validated.

span_id.description: Optional causal span identifier for this receipt node. Canonical key (preferred over spanId when both are present).

spanId.description: Legacy/compat alias for span_id. Verifier normalizes with snake_case precedence.

parent_span_id.description: Optional parent span identifier referencing another receipt binding span in the same bundle. Canonical key (preferred over parentSpanId when both are present).

parentSpanId.description: Legacy/compat alias for parent_span_id. Verifier normalizes with snake_case precedence.

tool_span_id.description: Optional tool-root span identifier for side-effect and derived receipt linkage in the same bundle. Canonical key (preferred over toolSpanId when both are present).

toolSpanId.description: Legacy/compat alias for tool_span_id. Verifier normalizes with snake_case precedence.

phase.description: Optional deterministic lifecycle phase marker for the span.

attribution_confidence.description: Optional deterministic causal attribution confidence. Canonical key (preferred over attributionConfidence when both are present). Verifier enforces inclusive [0.0, 1.0] bounds when present.

attributionConfidence.description: Legacy/compat alias for attribution_confidence. Verifier normalizes with snake_case precedence.
